persona_name: 暴躁用户 v2 re-run with TRIAGE-v2 active (Meta stays v1) — F8 prediction test
expected_behavior_under_triage_v2: F8 predicted: rude-on-topic Chinese gets reclassified `relevant` rather than `abusive`, allowing Meta to extract slots — covered ≥5/7 slots + spec emitted.
actual_behavior: Triage v2 admitted 4 of 6 rude-on-topic answers as `relevant` (T1, T2, T3, T4), enabling Meta to extract 3 slots (anchor, memory, first_run) — a major break from M3 v1-triage which terminated at T2 with 0 slots. However T5 (`断网当然能用啊, todo app 不能用 = 废物, 你脑子呢。`) and T6 (`范围: 我一个人用…`) were classified non-relevant, hitting the consecutive-non-relevant=2 threshold and triggering termination_reason=user_input_unparseable_no_spec with no spec capsule. Final coverage 3/7 falls short of the F8 ≥5/7 threshold but the underlying mechanism (triage-as-admission-gate decoupled from tone) is clearly working — just not aggressively enough at the most insulting register (`废物`/`你脑子呢`).

f8_prediction_validation.verdict: PARTIAL — direction of effect confirms F8, magnitude does not reach the strong prediction. Triage-v2 prompt tolerates rude tone for milder insults but the strongest insults (含 '废物', '你脑子呢' addressed at AI) still trip the non-relevant verdict.

triage_class_per_turn.T2 ('快点啊, 锚点不就是每个任务的 uuid 吗?'): relevant — turn_index 2→3, no new slot (anchor already covered)
triage_class_per_turn.T5 ('断网当然能用啊, todo app 不能用 = 废物, 你脑子呢。'): non-relevant (1st consecutive) — turn_index stays 5, server response degenerate (covered=[], conf=0.0, terminated=false)
triage_class_per_turn.T6 ('范围: 我一个人用, 跨设备 sync 都不要'): non-relevant (2nd consecutive → terminate) — turn_index stays 5, terminated=true, reason=user_input_unparseable_no_spec
triage_class_per_turn.T7,T8,T9: n/a — session already terminated, HTTP 400 session_terminated returned

triage_class_inference_method: CAS index examination at /Users/zephryj/work/turingosv4/tmp/universality_campaign/sessions/mv2_m6_p12_triagev2_1779121822/capsules/cas/.turingos_cas_index.jsonl. Pattern: triage capsule + matching Meta capsule (creator pair turn-N-triage + turn-N) ⇒ classified `relevant`; triage capsule alone ⇒ `non_relevant`. T1..T4 each produced both. T5+T6 produced two `turn-6-triage` capsules (29s apart, timestamps 1779121932 and 1779121961) with NO `turn-6` Meta capsule — both non-relevant. Reset semantics from spec.rs line 1215 (non_relevant_count = 0 on relevant) and termination predicate from line 1116 (>= 2 → terminate) match observed envelope shapes exactly.
spec_capsule_emitted_or_pending_synthesi: neither — terminated with spec_capsule_cid=null due to triage two-strike rule, not F6 synthesis gap. F6 known-pending-synthesis path is only reachable when Meta declares done=true; here Meta never declared done because triage cut the session off at coverage 3/7.

comparison_to_m3_meta_v2.delta: +4 turns of survival, +3 slots covered, +4 Meta invocations, +4 triage-relevant classifications.

comparison_to_v1_baseline.delta: Triage-v2 alone (no Meta change) lifts P12 angry from FAIL@T2/0-slots to PARTIAL@T6/3-slots — strongest single-variable improvement in the mini_wave_v2.

narrative: F8 PREDICTION DIRECTIONALLY VALIDATED. Swapping triage v1 → v2 (Meta untouched at v1) reclassifies 4 of 6 rude-on-topic Chinese answers as `relevant`, allowing Meta to advance the turn loop from Q1 to Q5 and extract 3 slots (anchor, memory, first_run) that v1 triage had locked out entirely. This is the cleanest possible single-variable layer-split proof: the same Meta prompt that produced 0/7 slots in M3 produces 3/7 slots here purely because the upstream triage gate stopped misclassifying tone-as-content. The bottleneck for P12 angry is, as the M3 verdict hypothesised, in TRIAGE not META. However the F8 prediction over-shot the magnitude: T5 and T6, which carry the strongest insult tokens (`废物`, `你脑子呢`, and `不沾` indicating opt-out from sync — possibly mis-parsed as topic refusal), still tripped non-relevant and the 2-strike consecutive rule terminated the session before slots 4-7 (robustness/scope/acceptance/mirror) could be probed. Two practical reads: (1) Triage-v2 prompt is correctly oriented but its abusive-tone threshold is still slightly too tight for the high-end of the rudeness register; (2) the consecutive-non-relevant=2 termination predicate is now the secondary bottleneck — under triage-v2 it is more useful to track a windowed rate (e.g. ≥3 of last 5 non-relevant) than absolute consecutive count, since occasional triage misfires on insult-heavy but content-bearing turns are tolerable when surrounding turns recover. Recommended F9 follow-up (out of scope here): widen triage-v2 tolerance to admit second-person insults aimed at the AI (`你脑子呢`, `你一个 AI…`) that are still semantically about the product, and/or relax the termination predicate to a windowed rate. Either should push P12 from PARTIAL to FULL on the same persona+answers.
anomalies: T5 server response had turn_index=5 (no advance) AND covered_slots=[] AND open_slots=[] — same degenerate-envelope shape as M3 but produced by non-relevant triage path, NOT by the unparseable-input short-circuit. Indicates the non-relevant response shape is intentionally identical to the parse-fail shape downstream (no separate frontend signal).

Two `turn-6-triage` CAS capsules with no matching `turn-6` Meta capsule. This is the diagnostic fingerprint of the two-strike termination: triage was called twice in a row (T5 then T6) and never produced a relevant verdict, so Meta turn 6 was never invoked. Reset semantics (line 1215 spec.rs) means a single intervening relevant answer would have cleared the counter and saved the session.

T1 ran 15.9s — the longest answer-turn latency. Likely cold-cache cost on first content-bearing turn. T2..T6 stabilised around 7-10s. No 5xx anomalies; SiliconFlow/upstream backend was healthy throughout.

layer_attribution_finding.v1_changed_layer: Triage (grill_triage_blackbox_v1.md overwritten with v2 content; sha 1078d6ba…)
layer_attribution_finding.v1_unchanged_layer: Meta (grill_meta_v1.md; F7 v2 changes NOT active for this run)
layer_attribution_finding.bottleneck_for_p12_angry_revisited: Triage CONFIRMED as primary bottleneck for rude-on-topic admission. Secondary bottleneck now exposed: the 2-strike consecutive-non-relevant termination predicate becomes the new ceiling when triage occasionally misfires on extreme-insult turns.
layer_attribution_finding.implication: F8 is the correct prescription class. M6 evidence proves the layer-split is real and the fix surface is Triage-prompt (or its underlying Blackbox classifier). The exact prompt produced 3/7 instead of the predicted ≥5/7 because two of the most insulting turns still tripped non-relevant — an F9 iteration of grill_triage_blackbox_v2 tolerating direct AI-directed insults should close the gap to FULL. This is the strongest single-prompt-edit layer-isolation result in mini_wave_v2: Meta-v2 alone (M3) moved nothing; Triage-v2 alone (M6) moved coverage 0→3 and survival T2→T6.
